manifest.description: Displays a floating, collapsible outline of a note's headings on the right side of the editor. Expands on hover, click to navigate.

manifest.author: Alexa Fazio

manifest.author: Cloud Atlas
manifest.name: Cloud Atlas
manifest.description: Cloud Atlas provides a unique way to use content from your vault with ChatGPT. Reference a note and it (optionally) gets resolved and sent along. We also provide a Canvas interface for ChatGPT. Advanced features include chaining results and batching.

manifest.author: Dale de Silva
manifest.name: Ink
manifest.description: Hand write or draw directly between paragraphs in your notes using a digital pen, stylus, or Apple pencil. Useful for handwriting, sketches, scribbles, or even math equations and scientific notation. Runs on the tldraw framework and drawing provides an infinite canvas.

manifest.author: Henri Jamet
manifest.name: Canvas Explorer
manifest.description: Explore your Obsidian vault by adding or ignoring linked notes, generating a customizable canvas with note sorting and section exclusion.

manifest.author: zhuxining
manifest.name: Attachment Uploader
manifest.description: Attachment uploader plugin, which allows you customize the upload command, customize upload file type.

manifest.name: Safe Filename Linter
manifest.description: Lints filenames for invalid or troublesome characters

manifest.author: LucasOe
manifest.name: Template Folder
manifest.description: Moves notes to a folder when applying a template.

manifest.author: Coduhuey
manifest.name: Prompt ChatGPT

manifest.author: Alexis Rondeau
manifest.name: Journey
manifest.description: Discover the stories between your notes.

manifest.description: Turn your inline images into darkmode (...and more!).
